title: J-B Weld 8267UK SteelStik Epoxy Putty, dark grey
features: HIGH STRENGTH - Exceptionally high strength provides a permanent repair to almost anything.
WET OR DRY SURFACES - Can be used on both wet and dry surfaces.
MULTIPLE MATERIALS - Some of the most common repairs are metal including aluminium, brass, copper, iron and stainless steel.
ENVIRONMENTAL RESISTANCE - Resistant to water, chemicals and heat.
AUTOMOTIVE APPLICATIONS - Perfect for repairing vehicle exhausts, rust damage and other automotive parts.
description: From the manufacturer SteelStik is a hand-mixable, steel-reinforced, non-rusting epoxy putty that quickly repairs or rebuilds anything made of metal. After mixing, it forms an industrial-strength polymer compound that can be molded into shapes or used to build up, patch and repair steel components. SteelStik sets in 3-5 minutes and after 60 minutes, can be drilled, tapped, machined, ground, filed and painted. SteelStik cures to a dark grey color, is rated at a tensile strength of 900 PSI and will withstand temperatures up to 300ºF. Additional Attributes Chemical resistant against petroleum, hydraulic fluids and may other harsh chemicals when fully cured. NSF Certified – Safe for contact with potable water. Can resist continuous temperatures of 300°F (149°C) intermittent temperatures of 450°F (232°C).
